text:
Created attachment 217413
svn diff of databases/mongodb42*

- Pretty trivial version update.
- Pet portlint: order of LICENSE* vars.
- Point www to manual of 4.2.
- Update CONFLICTS_INSTALL. (I don't see how -tools conflicted with mongodb.)
- Rename SSPL to SSPLv1 like the other mongodb* ports.
